name: GOLFTEC Bunker Hills
address: 12800 Bunker Prairie Rd NW, Coon Rapids, MN 55448
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting center focused on data-backed improvement. The centers feature advanced technology including launch monitors, OPTIMOTION motion analysis, and high-speed video systems to provide detailed swing feedback. Services range from private lessons and practice memberships to expert club fittings with a focus on measurable results, averaging 21 more yards off the tee through professional club fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like launch monitors and OPTIMOTION provide precise swing analysis
Data-driven club fittings offer an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Personalized lesson plans tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Access to training bays with simulator and video feedback technology

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used for fitting and analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though many students prefer to use their own equipment during sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted in GOLFTEC centers. The focus is on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator rounds typically take 2-3 hours depending on group size and course selected, similar to real golf pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and youth instruction with age-appropriate technology and coaching for younger golfers.
